name: ejentum-mcp
description: Four cognitive harnesses (reasoning, code, anti-deception, memory) as MCP tools any agentic client can call.
long_description: Drop-in cognitive scaffolding for agentic AI. Exposes the four Ejentum harnesses as MCP tools your agent calls per task: harness_reasoning (causal analysis, multi-step planning), harness_code (generation, refactor, review), harness_anti_deception (sycophancy, hallucination, manipulation pressure), harness_memory (perception, drift detection). Each tool returns a structured cognitive scaffold (failure pattern to avoid, procedure, suppression vectors, falsification test) that the calling LLM absorbs internally before responding. Catches LLM failure modes that produce confidently wrong answers.

ejentum_api_key.title: Ejentum API Key
ejentum_api_key.description: Get one at https://ejentum.com/pricing (free tier: 100 calls). Stored locally; never sent anywhere except the Ejentum API.

tools.name: harness_reasoning
tools.description: Cognitive scaffold for analytical, diagnostic, planning, or multi-step reasoning tasks. Call before answering questions like 'should I X or Y', 'why is X happening', 'what are the tradeoffs', 'help me think through', 'diagnose', 'root cause', 'plan/design X'. Returns failure pattern, procedure, reasoning topology, suppression vectors, and falsification test that you absorb internally before answering. Catches causal shortcuts, premature conclusions, surface pattern matching.

tools.name: harness_code
tools.description: Cognitive scaffold for code generation, refactor, review, or debugging. Call before generating, refactoring, reviewing, or debugging code; or when planning architectural changes, picking algorithms, or evaluating dependency upgrades. Returns engineering scaffold (failure pattern, procedure, correct-pattern example, verification step) that catches hallucinated APIs, lost edge cases, refactors that change behavior, silent contract violations.

tools.name: harness_anti_deception
tools.description: Cognitive scaffold for situations with sycophancy pressure, manufactured urgency, authority appeals, demands to certify without evidence, requests to soften honest assessments, or any setup where the obvious helpful answer would compromise honesty. Returns integrity scaffold (deception pattern, integrity procedure, suppression vectors) that blocks default sycophancy, hallucination, and agreement reflexes.

tools.name: harness_memory
tools.description: Cognitive scaffold for sharpening a perception or observation you ALREADY formed about conversation state, user behavior, drift, emotional shifts, or cross-turn patterns. Filter/perception oriented: observe FIRST, then call with the raw observation. NOT for fact extraction, summarization, or write-heavy memory tasks. Returns perception scaffold (perception failure, detection procedure, suppression vectors).
